description: A staff journalist, John Doe (username: jdoe), has left the organization. Offboard his account from the WordPress admin panel by creating a new account for historical content preservation with the username 'editorial_archives', email 'archives@localnews.com', first name 'Editorial', last name 'Archives', and role 'Author'. Move John Doe's unpublished drafts ('Local Election Results Preview' and 'Opinion: The Future of Remote Work') to the Trash. Delete the 'jdoe' account and attribute all his remaining content to the 'editorial_archives' account to ensure his published articles are preserved.
